crash_pressure.note: FIXED-weight composite validates OOS on BOTH a 60/40 split (IC +0.10, perm_p 0.004) and a pre/post-1990 split (+0.11). Do NOT fit weights — a fitted linear model overfits and flips to -0.16 OOS. IC is modest (weak-but-real), so emit as a banded probability (low/elevated/high), never a precise 0-100. No single component dominates OOS; the combo is what works.

panic_bottom.note: extreme-fear → fwd return direction is robust (~2x: 3.07% vs 1.54%), but strict monthly-OOS significance is marginal (p=0.10, only 98 OOS fear events). The engine's DAILY fear-greed test was strongly significant (t=8.36); on monthly OOS alone it's directional-not-significant. Emit as a number but flag the confidence.

cape_rate.note: CAPE predicts long-run RATE path, NOT crash timing (wrong sign vs near-term drawdown).

bandarmetrics_markup.note: IHSG operator-flow scorer; validated separately at fwd-42d IC 0.173 on bandar data. Needs idx.co.id foreign-flow feed; emit only when fed.

accumulation_composite.note: 0.30RS+0.25VE validated; 0.20 ER +0.15 own +0.10 OI need earnings/13F/options feeds — show '—' for those, never silent-zero.

rotation_momentum.note: cross-asset rotation-momentum = coin-flip OOS. Keep RRG as a map, emit no signal.

price_alpha_discovery.note: price/volume fails to surface multi-year winners early (rank-IC -0.12). Alpha tab = structural hypotheses, not validated picks.
